title: CFPE Counterfactual Pathway Matrix — 4 Eras × 3 Pathways
methodology: For each era, three distinct future pathways are generated: Optimistic (all top candidates succeed, cascade compounds), Pessimistic (key dependencies fail, field stagnates), and Wildcard (a currently-unpredicted shift reshapes the landscape). Each pathway includes 3+ mutually-exclusive observable signposts differentiated by earliest observation window. Signpost mutual exclusivity is enforced: a signpost confirming one pathway must be incompatible with the other two pathways for that era.

pathways.name: Optimistic: The FCI Breakthrough
pathways.narrative: FCI heterostructure fabrication achieves wafer-scale precision by 2028. Non-abelian anyon braiding is confirmed at ν=5/2 by 2029 with >99% fidelity. The Bruhat-Tits tree topology shows a measurable 10× error-confinement advantage over surface codes. By 2032, IBM and Google announce FCI research divisions. The era closes with a 100-logical-qubit FCI processor operating at 4K — no dilution refrigerator needed. Active QEC is now the backup plan, not the main event.

signposts.description: Nature/Science paper: 'Wafer-Scale Fractional Chern Insulator with Layer Precision < 1nm' published by ≥2 independent groups
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P2 (stagnation) and E1-P3 (twistronics absorbs FCI)
signposts.verification: arXiv + Nature/Science search for wafer-scale FCI fabrication

signposts.description: Major QC company (Google/IBM/Quantinuum) announces dedicated FCI/topological QC research program with >$100M budget
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P2 (continued gate-only investment) and E1-P3 (investment pivots to 2D materials, not FCI per se)
signposts.verification: Press release monitoring + Quantum Insider / HPCwire

signposts.description: FCI logical qubit T₂* > 1ms at T > 1K demonstrated — thermal protection thesis experimentally validated
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P2 (no FCI coherence above mK) and E1-P3 (twistronics qubits use different protection mechanism)
signposts.verification: arXiv search: FCI coherence at T > 1K

signposts.description: First FCI-based quantum algorithm executed: Shor's factoring of 15 on >10 FCI logical qubits with >95% success rate
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with both other pathways (neither achieves FCI computation)
signposts.verification: arXiv + press coverage of first FCI algorithm execution

pathways.name: Pessimistic: The Thermal Wall Holds
pathways.narrative: FCI fabrication proves impossible at scale — charge disorder densities remain >10¹¹ cm⁻² across all devices through 2029. The ultrametric threshold advantage is shown (in independent simulation) to be 55× worse than claimed, not better. Gate-based QC continues but the thermal wall bites: at 5,000 qubits, dilution refrigerators cannot maintain base temperature during QEC cycles. Error rates climb with qubit count. By 2034, the 'quantum winter' narrative dominates — venture capital retreats, national programs are audited, and 'quantum utility' joins 'AI winter' in the lexicon of overhyped technologies.

signposts.description: Independent computational study (not QNFO-authored) confirms FCI/ultrametric error thresholds are worse than surface codes by >10× — published in PRL or equivalent
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P1 (optimistic FCI results) and E1-P3 (twistronics offers a different path)
signposts.verification: arXiv search: independent simulation/comparison of ultrametric vs surface code thresholds

signposts.description: At least one major dilution refrigerator manufacturer reports that next-generation QC systems require cooling beyond current thermodynamic limits
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P1 (FCI doesn't need dilution refrigerators) and ambiguous vs E1-P3
signposts.verification: Cryogenics industry publications + QC company technical blogs

signposts.description: VC investment in quantum computing drops >50% year-over-year; at least one major QC startup fails or pivots to classical HPC
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P1 (investment would increase on FCI breakthroughs) and E1-P3 (twistronics would attract new investment)
signposts.verification: Crunchbase/PitchBook funding data + tech press coverage of QC startup failures

pathways.name: Wildcard: Twistronics Absorbs Quantum Computing
pathways.narrative: The FCI vs gate-based debate is rendered obsolete by a convergence nobody predicted: twisted bilayer graphene and transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) moiré heterostructures achieve both strong correlations AND topological order at tunable angles — including non-abelian states at 'magic angle' variants discovered in 2027-2028. The twistronics community (originally focused on superconductivity) absorbs the topological QC community. By 2030, 'twistronic qubits' — anyons defined by moiré superlattice geometry rather than fractional quantum Hall physics — are the leading topological QC platform. FCI becomes a historical footnote in the larger twistronics story. The key insight: the relevant degree of freedom was always the moiré pattern, not the Chern number.

signposts.description: arXiv paper: 'Non-Abelian Anyons in Magic-Angle Twisted Bilayer Graphene at ν=3/2' — non-abelian statistics confirmed in a moiré system, not a traditional FCI
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P1 (FCI, not twistronics, leads) and E1-P2 (would be a major breakthrough, not stagnation)
signposts.verification: arXiv search: 'twisted bilayer graphene' AND 'non-abelian' AND 'anyon'

signposts.description: Major condensed matter conference (APS March Meeting) dedicates >3 invited sessions to 'moiré topological quantum computing' — the term appears in mainstream physics discourse
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E1-P1 (FCI dominates) and E1-P2 (no QC paradigm dominates)
signposts.verification: APS March Meeting program search for 'moiré topological' sessions

signposts.description: First 'twistronic qubit' braiding experiment published: anyons in TMD moiré heterostructure braided with >90% fidelity at 4K
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with both other pathways (neither predicts moiré qubits)
signposts.verification: Nature/Science search for twistronic/moiré qubit braiding

pathway_differentiation.best_discriminating_signpost: E1-P1 signpost 2 (major QC company announces FCI program) vs E1-P3 signpost 2 (APS March Meeting sessions on 'moiré topological QC') — these are the most mutually informative signposts; observing one strongly rules out the other.
pathway_differentiation.earliest_resolution: 2028 (by end of 2028, at least one of the three pathways will have a confirmed signpost)

pathways.name: Optimistic: The √SWAP Gate at 310K
pathways.narrative: A breakthrough in synthetic zwitterionic polymer networks (2028-2030) stabilizes spin coherence for >10 ms at 310K — bridging the gap from biological passive coherence to active gate manipulation. The key insight: the polymer network doesn't just suppress noise; it actively refocuses spin states through viscoelastic feedback, analogous to spin echo but implemented mechanically. By 2032, a √SWAP gate is demonstrated with 99% fidelity in a synthetic cryptochrome-mimetic channel. By 2038, the first bio-spintronic co-processor — a Posner-cluster-based quantum annealer operating at room temperature — outperforms cryogenic annealers on protein folding benchmarks. The 'viscosity paradox' is resolved: low viscosity accelerates spin transport through the channel; what matters is not viscosity but viscoelastic relaxation time matching the spin precession period.

signposts.description: Synthetic cryptochrome-mimetic channel demonstrates spin coherence >10 ms at 310K — 100× improvement over biological cryptochrome
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P2 (no synthetic coherence achieved) and E2-P3 (NV centers dominate, not biological)
signposts.verification: Nature/Science/PRL search for synthetic biomimetic spin coherence at room temperature

signposts.description: First controllable √SWAP gate in a biological substrate: >99% fidelity at 310K in a published experiment
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with all other pathways (no bio-spintronic gate demonstrated elsewhere)
signposts.verification: arXiv + press search for 'radical pair √SWAP gate'

signposts.description: Bio-spintronic co-processor benchmarked against D-Wave: superior performance on protein folding with >100× energy efficiency (joules per solution)
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P2 (no bio-spintronic processor exists) and E2-P3 (NV centers, not biological, lead)
signposts.verification: arXiv + tech press for bio-spintronic benchmark results

pathways.name: Pessimistic: The Witness-vs-Gate Gap Cannot Be Bridged
pathways.narrative: Despite intensive effort (2028-2035), no synthetic biomimetic channel achieves >100 µs spin coherence at 310K — biological cryptochrome remains the ceiling. The categorical gap between passive quantum witnessing (what biology does) and active gate manipulation (what computation requires) proves fundamental. Every attempt to introduce control fields (microwave pulses, magnetic gradients) destroys the coherence the biological system provides. The viscosity paradox turns out to be a red herring — the real issue is that biological spin states are thermalized, not pure, and no polymer chemistry can extract a computational resource from a thermal state. By 2040, bio-spintronics is abandoned as a computational paradigm and reclassified as a biosensing technology.

signposts.description: Systematic review paper: 'Limits of Biomimetic Spin Coherence' — meta-analysis of 50+ synthetic channel experiments shows coherence ceiling of ~100 µs at 310K, with zero gate demonstrations
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P1 (>10 ms coherence achieved) and E2-P3 (NV centers bypass this ceiling)
signposts.verification: arXiv search for biomimetic spin coherence review/meta-analysis

signposts.description: Major bio-spintronics research program (e.g., DARPA QuBE equivalent) cancelled or defunded after 5-year review shows zero gate demonstrations
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P1 (program would be expanded after √SWAP demonstration)
signposts.verification: Defense/grant agency press releases + science policy news

signposts.description: Leading bio-spintronics group pivots to NV-diamond centers or silicon spin qubits — published statement acknowledges 'biological gate operations remain out of reach'
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P1 (groups would double down on bio-spintronics)
signposts.verification: arXiv + institutional press releases tracking bio-spintronics → solid-state pivot announcements

pathways.name: Wildcard: NV-Diamond Centers Bypass the Biological Pathway Entirely
pathways.narrative: The entire bio-spintronics program is leapfrogged by an unexpected development in solid-state spin qubits: nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond achieve room-temperature spin coherence >1 second through isotopically purified ¹²C diamond with dynamical decoupling. By 2030, NV centers demonstrate two-qubit gates at 300K with >99.9% fidelity. The 'biological pathway' turns out to be unnecessary — nature's solution (cryptochrome) is elegant but inefficient; solid-state spin qubits achieve every desirable property (long coherence, high fidelity, room temperature) without any biological complexity. The QNFO insight that 'biological systems prove room-temperature coherence is possible' was correct, but the extrapolation that 'biological substrates are the necessary path' was wrong. Era 2 still happens — just via NV centers, not radical pairs.

signposts.description: NV center in isotopically purified diamond demonstrates T₂ > 1 second at 300K with dynamical decoupling — published in Nature/Science
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P2 (pessimistic about any room-temp coherence) and partially compatible with E2-P1 (same era objective, different substrate)
signposts.verification: arXiv: 'NV center' AND 'room temperature' AND ('coherence' OR 'T2') AND 'second'

signposts.description: Two-qubit NV gate demonstrated at 300K with >99.9% fidelity — surpassing surface code threshold without cryogenics
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P2 (no room-temperature gate exists) and differentiates from E2-P1 (solid-state, not biological)
signposts.verification: arXiv: 'NV center' AND 'two-qubit gate' AND 'room temperature' AND 'fidelity'

signposts.description: Commercial NV-center quantum processor announced (e.g., Quantum Brilliance or equivalent) — room-temperature, rack-mountable, no dilution refrigerator
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E2-P2 (no room-temp processor) and differentiates from E2-P1 (NV, not bio-spintronic)
signposts.verification: Tech press + company announcements for room-temperature quantum processor products

pathway_differentiation.best_discriminating_signpost: E2-P1 signpost 2 (√SWAP in biological substrate) vs E2-P3 signpost 2 (NV two-qubit gate at 300K) — observing either strongly confirms its pathway and rules out the other as the dominant room-temperature QC substrate.
pathway_differentiation.earliest_resolution: 2030-2032 (by 2032, either bio-spintronics or NV centers will have demonstrated room-temperature gate operations)

pathways.name: Optimistic: CMB Confirms Discrete Scale Invariance
pathways.narrative: The CMB-S4 experiment (or successor) detects log-periodic oscillations in the CMB angular power spectrum at >5σ significance by 2035. The fundamental scaling ratio q is measured at q ≈ e (2.718...) — consistent with the Syntactic Token Calculus prediction. This is the first direct evidence for a discrete, hierarchical structure of spacetime. The hydrodynamic foundations program accelerates: the CMB result anchors Era 3 to an empirical prediction distinct from standard ΛCDM. By 2050, trapped-ion quantum simulations of the Wheeler-DeWitt equation with diagonal clock-rest interactions demonstrate ultrametric conditional states (<1% Parisi violation), confirming the Bridge Theorem's sharp sufficient condition. The hydrodynamic reformulation of quantum mechanics produces its first experimentally verified prediction — the CMB anomaly — and transitions from 'fringe theory' to 'alternative interpretation with empirical support.'

signposts.description: CMB-S4 (or Simons Observatory) analysis detects log-periodic oscillations in Cℓ at >5σ — published with explicit scaling ratio q
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P2 (null result) and E3-P3 (different anomaly explanation)
signposts.verification: arXiv + press: CMB-S4/Simons Observatory log-periodic oscillation detection

signposts.description: Trapped-ion quantum simulation of Wheeler-DeWitt with diagonal H_CR achieves <1% Parisi ultrametricity violation — Bridge Theorem experimentally validated
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P2 (no simulation success) and E3-P3 (different theoretical framework validated)
signposts.verification: arXiv: 'trapped ion' AND 'Wheeler-DeWitt' AND 'ultrametric'

signposts.description: At least one textbook or major review includes 'hydrodynamic quantum foundations' as a recognized interpretation alongside Copenhagen, Many-Worlds, de Broglie-Bohm
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P2 (remains fringe) and differentiates from E3-P3 (different interpretation gains acceptance)
signposts.verification: Physics textbook citations + PhilSci/PhilPhysics literature review

pathways.name: Pessimistic: Superdeterminism Remains a Philosophical Curiosity
pathways.narrative: CMB-S4 finds no log-periodic oscillations (null result at >5σ exclusion by 2035). The Syntactic Token Calculus prediction is falsified. Trapped-ion simulations confirm that generic clock-rest interactions produce 29-35% Parisi violation — the sharp sufficient condition (diagonal H_CR) does not hold in any physically realizable system. Superdeterminism remains logically coherent but produces zero experimentally verified predictions distinct from standard QM. By 2060, the hydrodynamic foundations program is recognized as an elegant mathematical framework that makes no contact with experiment — a beautiful theory that nature declined to implement. The key failure: the CMB prediction was specific and falsifiable, and it was falsified. The program's honesty in making falsifiable predictions is commendable; the falsification itself is conclusive.

signposts.description: CMB-S4 null result for log-periodic oscillations: exclusion at >5σ — STC prediction falsified in peer-reviewed publication
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P1 (detection) and E3-P3 (different anomaly found)
signposts.verification: arXiv: CMB-S4/Simons Observatory null result for log-periodic oscillations

signposts.description: Comprehensive review: 'Ultrametric Quantum Foundations: A Decade of Null Results' — summarizes 10+ years of experimental searches with zero positive detections
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P1 (positive detections would exist)
signposts.verification: Reviews of Modern Physics / Physics Reports search for ultrametric foundations null-result review

signposts.description: Quantum foundations community consensus statement or PhilSci survey: >80% of physicists classify superdeterminism as 'unfalsifiable in practice' or 'experimentally indistinguishable from standard QM'
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P1 (superdeterminism would have empirical support)
signposts.verification: PhilSci/philosophy of physics literature survey on superdeterminism acceptance

pathways.name: Wildcard: Objective Collapse Models Win the Foundations Race
pathways.narrative: The contest to replace standard quantum mechanics is won not by superdeterminism or hydrodynamic foundations, but by objective collapse models (e.g., Continuous Spontaneous Localization, Diósi-Penrose). A tabletop experiment in 2032 detects spontaneous radiation emission from a superposition of a 10¹⁴-atom mechanical oscillator — the CSL noise floor is observed at the predicted level. This provides the first direct evidence that wavefunction collapse is a physical process, not a mathematical artifact. The hydrodynamic foundations program doesn't die — it partially converges with CSL: the 'collapse as fluid instability' interpretation becomes a CSL variant. The QNFO insight that 'collapse is physical, not epistemic' was correct; the specific hydrodynamic mechanism was wrong. By 2050, CSL is the leading interpretation with experimental support, and the QNFO program is retrospectively understood as a precursor that correctly identified the problem but proposed the wrong solution.

signposts.description: Tabletop experiment detects CSL-predicted spontaneous radiation from macroscopic superposition — published in Nature/Science with >5σ significance
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P1 (different mechanism for collapse) and E3-P2 (no collapse mechanism detected)
signposts.verification: Nature/Science search for CSL/objective collapse experimental detection

signposts.description: Review paper: 'Convergence of Objective Collapse and Hydrodynamic Quantum Foundations' — identifies formal equivalences between CSL noise and viscoelastic fluid instability models
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Differentiates from both E3-P1 and E3-P2 (convergence narrative unique to this pathway)
signposts.verification: arXiv: 'objective collapse' AND 'hydrodynamic' AND 'quantum foundations'

signposts.description: 2026 Nobel-caliber prize in physics awarded for experimental detection of objective wavefunction collapse — CSL becomes the standard post-QM framework
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E3-P1 (superdeterminism recognized) and E3-P2 (no post-QM framework recognized)
signposts.verification: Nobel Prize / Breakthrough Prize announcements for collapse detection

pathway_differentiation.best_discriminating_signpost: E3-P1 signpost 1 (CMB log-periodic detection) vs E3-P2 signpost 1 (null result) vs E3-P3 signpost 1 (CSL radiation detection) — these three are fully mutually exclusive; observing any one strongly rules out the other two.
pathway_differentiation.earliest_resolution: 2032-2035 (by 2035, either CMB oscillations are detected, null, or CSL provides an alternative experimental anchor)

pathways.name: Optimistic: α Derived from π/φ — The Geometric Program Succeeds
pathways.narrative: A breakthrough in the 2040s: the fine-structure constant α ≈ 1/137.036 is derived from pure π/φ geometry to within experimental precision (< 1 part in 10⁹). The derivation does not come from the adelic framework directly but from a convergent development in amplituhedron geometry and cosmological polytopes (Arkani-Hamed et al.). The key insight: α is the volume of a specific amplituhedron in momentum twistor space, and that volume is a pure function of π and the golden ratio φ through the geometry of the positive Grassmannian. This vindicates the QNFO thesis that coupling constants are geometric, not fundamental — even though the specific mathematical mechanism (adelic rather than amplituhedron) differs. By 2070, the 'geometric constants' program is mainstream: three SM couplings are derived geometrically, and the remaining ones are understood as projections of higher-dimensional geometric invariants.

signposts.description: α ≈ 1/137.035999084 derived from amplituhedron volume expressed in π/φ ratios — published in PRL or equivalent, with precision matching CODATA to <1 part in 10⁹
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E4-P2 (no geometric derivation) and E4-P3 (string landscape, not geometry)
signposts.verification: PRL/arXiv: 'fine structure constant' AND ('amplituhedron' OR 'cosmological polytope' OR 'geometric derivation')

signposts.description: ≥3 Standard Model coupling constants (α, α_s, sin²θ_W) derived from pure geometry in independent publications by ≥2 groups
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with other pathways (no geometric program success)
signposts.verification: Review literature on geometric derivation of SM constants

signposts.description: The term 'geometric naturalness' replaces 'anthropic reasoning' in fundamental physics discourse — constants understood as geometric invariants, not random landscape draws
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E4-P3 (anthropic/landscape wins)
signposts.verification: Philosophy of physics + HEP theory community discourse analysis

pathways.name: Pessimistic: Eddington's Ghost — Constants Resist Geometric Derivation
pathways.narrative: Despite a century of attempts (Eddington 1929 → Wyler 1971 → Gilson 1999 → QNFO 2026 → ... ), no geometric derivation of any SM coupling constant achieves consensus acceptance by 2100. The problem turns out to be deeper than numerology: coupling constants are scale-dependent (running couplings in QFT), and any geometric derivation at one scale must either reproduce the full renormalization group flow or explain why a specific scale is geometrically privileged. No derivation achieves either. The adelic framework produces elegant mathematics but no numbers. By 2100, 'geometric constant derivation' joins 'perpetual motion' and 'cold fusion' as a historically significant but scientifically failed research program — a cautionary tale about the seductive power of mathematical elegance over empirical constraint.

signposts.description: Comprehensive review: 'A Century of Failed Geometric Derivations of α' — published in Reviews of Modern Physics, documenting 100+ years of attempts with zero successes
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E4-P1 (successes would exist)
signposts.verification: Reviews of Modern Physics / Physics Reports for geometric constant derivation failure review

signposts.description: The adelic physics program produces zero experimentally verified predictions by 2100 — program is classified as 'mathematical physics with no physical content' in consensus review
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E4-P1 and E4-P3 (both produce testable predictions)
signposts.verification: Centennial review of adelic physics program — experimental verification scorecard

signposts.description: Standard Model remains the 'Theory of Almost Everything' — no post-SM framework achieves experimental confirmation by 2126
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with both other pathways (post-SM breakthroughs exist)
signposts.verification: PDG + HEP review literature on post-SM status at centennial

pathways.name: Wildcard: The String Landscape Absorbs the Geometric Program
pathways.narrative: The geometric constant program doesn't fail — it's absorbed by a much larger development. The string theory landscape (10⁵⁰⁰ vacua) is tamed by a discovery in the 2050s: the distribution of coupling constants across the landscape is NOT random but follows a specific measure determined by the geometry of Calabi-Yau moduli spaces. The 'anthropic principle' is replaced by 'geometric selection' — our universe's constants are determined by the measure on the landscape, and that measure is a pure function of topological invariants of the compactification manifold. The QNFO geometric program was right that constants have a geometric origin, but wrong about the scale: the relevant geometry is not π/φ ratios at the electroweak scale but topological invariants of 6D Calabi-Yau spaces. By 2100, 'geometric naturalness' in the string landscape is the consensus framework. Ostrowski's theorem and p-adic completions turn out to be special cases of a more general theory of geometric vacua selection.

signposts.description: Proof that the string landscape measure is determined by Calabi-Yau topological invariants — published with explicit computation of α distribution across 10⁶ sampled vacua
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E4-P1 (amplituhedron, not CY) and E4-P2 (no success at all)
signposts.verification: arXiv: 'string landscape' AND ('measure' OR 'distribution') AND ('Calabi-Yau' OR 'topological invariant')

signposts.description: Observed SM coupling constants fall within the predicted geometric landscape distribution with p < 0.01 — the 'anthropic coincidence' becomes a geometric prediction
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Incompatible with E4-P1 (different geometric mechanism) and E4-P2 (null result)
signposts.verification: HEP review literature on landscape-CY predictions vs observation

signposts.description: Ostrowski's theorem recognized as a special case of vacua selection: p-adic completions correspond to specific CY singularities in the moduli space
signposts.mutual_exclusivity: Partially compatible with E4-P1 (adelic insights are validated, just subsumed), but incompatible with E4-P2
signposts.verification: Mathematics + HEP literature connecting Ostrowski to CY moduli space geometry

pathway_differentiation.best_discriminating_signpost: E4-P1 signpost 1 (α from amplituhedron) vs E4-P3 signpost 1 (landscape measure from CY invariants) — the geometric mechanism differs fundamentally (positive Grassmannian vs Calabi-Yau moduli), and the first confirmed derivation will strongly discriminate.
pathway_differentiation.earliest_resolution: 2045-2060 (the geometric constant derivation race resolves in this window)

cross_era_pathway_combinations.most_coherent_full_pipeline: E1-P1 (FCI breakthrough) → E2-P3 (NV centers at room temp) → E3-P3 (CSL objective collapse) → E4-P1 (amplituhedron derives α)
cross_era_pathway_combinations.most_pessimistic_full_pipeline: E1-P2 (thermal wall holds) → E2-P2 (witness-vs-gate gap fatal) → E3-P2 (superdeterminism falsified) → E4-P2 (Eddington's ghost — no derivation)
cross_era_pathway_combinations.most_surprising_full_pipeline: E1-P3 (twistronics absorbs QC) → E2-P3 (NV centers bypass biology) → E3-P3 (CSL objective collapse wins) → E4-P3 (string landscape absorbs geometric program)

full_pipeline_probability.note: The probability of any specific cross-era pathway combination is the product of conditional era probabilities from the Bayesian cascade model. The 'most coherent' pipeline above has probability ≈ 0.25 × 0.70 × 0.85 × 0.40 = 5.95% under the original Bayesian model — but both components are likely overestimates given Phase 0 findings.
full_pipeline_probability.phase_0_adjusted_estimate: < 1% (each era probability is independently reduced by evidence grading + adversarial red-team findings)

strategic_implications.implication_1: The CFPE cascade is NOT a single forecast but a branching tree of 3⁴ = 81 distinct cross-era pathway combinations. The Bayesian model treated each era as having 3 states (Opt/Base/Pess) — the counterfactual analysis reveals that the actual state space is larger and more complex.
strategic_implications.implication_2: The earliest resolution window is 2028-2030 for Era 1 — within 2-4 years of today. The CFPE forecast is more testable than its 100-year horizon suggests. Strategic decisions can be informed by near-term signpost observations rather than waiting for full cascade resolution.
strategic_implications.implication_3: The wildcard pathways (E1-P3, E2-P3, E3-P3, E4-P3) consistently involve QNFO's core insights being validated but via different mechanisms than predicted. This suggests the CFPE framework's value is in identifying the right QUESTIONS (room-temperature coherence, geometric constants, collapse mechanism) even when the right ANSWERS come from unexpected quarters.
strategic_implications.implication_4: The NV-center wildcard (E2-P3) is the most actionable near-term pathway: NV-center research is active today (2026), and the key signpost (T₂ > 1s at 300K) is checkable within 2 years. This pathway validates the QNFO thesis that room-temperature QC is possible, even if the substrate differs from the bio-spintronic prediction.
